27. In Kantha Vibhag Yuva Koli Samaj Parivartan Trust Vs. State of 
Gujarat 6, this Court dealt with an appeal arising out of an order passed 
by the NGT dismissing an original application alleging environmental 
degradation and seeking restitution of the environment. This Court 
observed that it is important to differentiate expert committees 
which are set up by the courts/tribunals from those set up by the 
government in exercise of executive powers or under a particular 
statute and held as follows:
17. It is first important to differentiate Expert Committees 
which are set up by the courts/tribunals from those set 
up by the Government in exercise of executive powers 
or under a particular statute. The latter are set up due 
to their technical expertise in a given area, and their
